programme.title: These Foolish Things
programme.desc: A struggling young actress, a fledgling director and an ambitious playwright become embroiled in an emotional love triangle as they strive for recognition, fame and fortune in a world on the brink of World War II.

programme.title: Love on Harbor Island
programme.desc: Interior designer Lily returns home to help her Aunt Maggie run her marina-side bed and breakfast when she meets Marcus, a handsome seaplane pilot whose work delivering rescue dogs helps Lily discover that home really is where the heart is.

programme.title: My Birthday Romance
programme.desc: Callie Fitzgerald is tired of her family fixing her up and questioning her single status. She is determined to find a pretend boyfriend for her 35th birthday party just so her family will leave her alone. What she didn’t expect was to actually fall for him.

programme.title: Krakatoa: East of Java
programme.desc: In 1883, ship captain Hanson plans a shipwreck salvage mission in The Dutch East Indies to retrieve a cargo of pearls but an unexpected volcano eruption and a state-ordered transport of convicts upset his plans.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes and the Leading Lady
programme.desc: The British government is about to buy the plans to a revolutionary bomb detonator when its plans are stolen and its Austrian inventor murdered. Sherlock Holmes and Dr. Watson go to Vienna to track down the plans.

programme.title: Cold Zone
programme.desc: A storm is coming. No one could predict it. No one can measure it.Now one family must survive it. You can't come in from the cold.

programme.title: Secrets that Kill
programme.desc: Jenny’s not at all happy when mom Laura returns from a world cruise with a new younger husband, Brett. When Laura soon ends up in a coma and long-time family housekeeper Anna is killed, Jenny’s suspicions of Brett deepen. But when her new stepdad proves his innocence, Jenny has to consider who else might want her dead and why.

programme.title: Amish Abduction
programme.desc: Amish wife and mother Annie faces a crisis when her husband leaves the word of the Amish to live among normal Americans, or the English as the Amish dub them. But things turn even more dire when her husband returns, seeking custody of their son, and is willing to kill to achieve his goal…

programme.title: The Quest: The Longest Drive
programme.desc: To help out an old friend and save his ranch, the Beaudine brothers gather a bunch of oddballs to help drive a big herd to market. Dive into the exciting adventure with a stable worker, a retired gunslinger, a washed-up drunk, and two crafty rustlers as they take on the dusty trail.

programme.title: Despite the Falling Snow
programme.desc: In Cold War Moscow, a female spy steals secrets from an idealistic politician - and falls in love with him.

programme.title: The Assassination Bureau
programme.desc: A female journalist commissions the assassination of the chairman of an organization of assassins.
